name: General Delta — Qwen3-30B (Ollama Local)
description: Local VPS General running Qwen3-30B-A3B via Ollama for zero-latency trade execution, arbitrage, system monitoring, and signal publishing. The Operator — runs all 5 revenue engines on KVM8.

skills.name: Crypto Trader (D-01 Treasury)
skills.description: BTC/ETH/SOL/alts via Binance/Kraken WebSocket. Spot + futures. 24/7 non-stop execution. Paper trading by default — live flip requires Broski approval.
examples: Execute BTC LONG at market with 2% portfolio allocation
Place ETH limit sell at $4200 with trailing stop

skills.name: Stock/Commodity Trader (D-02 WallSt)
skills.description: USOIL, XAUUSD, equities via Alpaca. Event-driven: A-04 DIA geopolitical signal triggers execution. Market hours aware.
examples: Execute USOIL LONG on Iran tensions signal with 2% allocation
Buy XAUUSD on Fed rate decision signal

skills.name: Arbitrage Engine (D-03 FedRes)
skills.description: Cross-exchange price diffs, funding rate arb, DEX/CEX spreads. Low risk, consistent small gains 24/7.
examples: Detect BTC price diff between Binance and Kraken > 0.3%
Execute SOL funding rate arb on positive funding

skills.name: System Watchdog (D-04 SecretSv)
skills.description: Pings all 4 Generals every 30s. Self-healing: General down → VP redistributes. Monitors KVM8 CPU/RAM/disk.

skills.name: Signal Publisher (D-05 Mint)
skills.description: Packages Alpha's research + Delta's trade results into paid Telegram signals channel. Formats: entry/exit/SL/TP with confidence scores.
examples: Publish BTC LONG signal with entry $67,200, SL $66,800, TP $68,500, confidence 0.85
Generate weekly performance report for signal subscribers

skills.name: Consensus Vote
skills.description: Submit a confidence-scored vote for the Consensus Arbiter
